Uses of Package
io.vanslog.spring.data.meilisearch.core

Packages that use io.vanslog.spring.data.meilisearch.core
Package
Description
io.vanslog.spring.data.meilisearch.client.msc
This package contains classes that use the Meilisearch client library (com.meilisearch.sdk:meilisearch-java) to access Meilisearch.
